name: MEGOLA INC
summary: DEVELOPMENT Megola, Inc. was incorporated in Ontario, Canada on August 28, 2000 as Corporation No. 1375595. It was renamed Megola, Inc. on December 21, 2001. Megola was formed to sell physical water treatment devices to residential, commercial, industrial and agricultural end-users in the United States, Canada and other international locations under a license granted by the German manufacturer, Megola GmbH. Initial operations and sales began in October 2000. On November 26, 2003, Megola was acqu...
